endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Azure Machine Learning Studio Commitment Plan RP REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/commitmentPlans
endpoints.description: Retrieve all Azure ML commitment plans in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/skus
endpoints.description: Lists the available commitment plan SKUs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/commitmentPlans
endpoints.description: Retrieve all Azure ML commitment plans in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/commitmentPlans/{commitmentPlanName}
endpoints.description: Retrieve an Azure ML commitment plan by its subscription, resource group and name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{COMMITMENTPLANNAME}} with a real commitmentplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/commitmentPlans/{commitmentPlanName}
endpoints.description: Create a new Azure ML commitment plan resource or updates an existing one.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{COMMITMENTPLANNAME}} with a real commitmentplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/commitmentPlans/{commitmentPlanName}
endpoints.description: Remove an existing Azure ML commitment plan.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{COMMITMENTPLANNAME}} with a real commitmentplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/commitmentPlans/{commitmentPlanName}
endpoints.description: Patch an existing Azure ML commitment plan resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{COMMITMENTPLANNAME}} with a real commitmentplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/commitmentPlans/{commitmentPlanName}/commitmentAssociations
endpoints.description: Get all commitment associations for a parent commitment plan.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{COMMITMENTPLANNAME}} with a real commitmentplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/commitmentPlans/{commitmentPlanName}/commitmentAssociations/{commitmentAssociationName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{COMMITMENTASSOCIATIONNAME}} with a real commitmentassociationname. Replace {{COMMITMENTPLANNAME}} with a real commitmentplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/commitmentPlans/{commitmentPlanName}/commitmentAssociations/{commitmentAssociationName}/move
endpoints.description: Re-parent a commitment association from one commitment plan to another.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{COMMITMENTASSOCIATIONNAME}} with a real commitmentassociationname. Replace {{COMMITMENTPLANNAME}} with a real commitmentplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearning/commitmentPlans/{commitmentPlanName}/usageHistory
endpoints.description: Retrieve the usage history for an Azure ML commitment plan.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{COMMITMENTPLANNAME}} with a real commitmentplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
